name: sync mechanism records a sync run timestamp to a state file for the daily-fresh check
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []\noperator_namespace: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/sync-from-sources.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --state .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/sync-state.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"last_sync_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"' .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/sync-state.json && echo ok 1>&2
